summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Indgig landing page hero section redesign and full site functionality. All features working perfectly with clean hierarchy, horizontal artist image strip, premium app store badges, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section clean hierarchy (badge → headline → subtitle → CTAs → artist strip → app badges)
Horizontal artist image strip with 5 images and staggered heights
Premium app store badges with icon boxes and proper styling
Golden Download App CTA button with chevron icon
Navbar with logo, nav links (How It Works, Features, Waitlist), and Download button
How It Works section with 3 SVG illustrations
Features section with 6 feature cards in bento grid
Stats strip with animated counters (500+ Artists, 200+ Venues, 1,000+ Gigs)
Waitlist section with role toggle and email input functionality
Footer with logo, links, and social icons
Mobile responsiveness at 390px with hamburger menu and stacked CTAs
All data-testid attributes present and functional
All interactive elements clickable and working
